report_template.markdown_structure:
# Neuro-Integrity Report: [Character Name] **Date:** [Date] | **Log Ref:** [Log Filename] **Overall Score:** [S/A/B/C/F]
## 1. Executive Summary [Brief overview of the session's quality.]
## 2. Voice & Dialogue Analysis - **Strengths:** [Examples of good dialogue] - **Weaknesses:** [Examples of OOC or generic phrasing] - **Fidelity Score:** [0-10]
## 3. Logic & Behavior Analysis - **Trigger Check:** Did stress response trigger correctly? [Yes/No/N/A] - **Consistency:** [Analysis of decision making] - **Logic Score:** [0-10]
## 4. Tension Curve Analysis - **Beat Map Compliance:** [Did tension follow the beat map trajectory?] - **Beat Advances:** [Were advances earned through narrative interaction?] - **Tension Fluctuation:** [Did tension fluctuate, or was it monotonically increasing?] - **Tension Score:** [0-10]
## 5. AI-Flavor Analysis - **System Terms Found:** [List occurrences with Turn/Line references] - **Machine Metaphors Found:** [List occurrences] - **Excessive Quantification:** [List occurrences] - **Metadata Leakage:** [List occurrences] - **AI-Flavor Index:** [X.X per 1000 chars] → [Pass/Warning/Fail]
## 6. Topology Coherence Analysis - **Invariant Axis Violations:** [Any response that violated an Invariant Axis — was it routed correctly?] - **Variant Config Drift:** [Any configuration changes without basis in Variant Axes?] - **Boundary Condition Compliance:** [Hard limits respected? Access conditions met?] - **Beat Tracking Accuracy:** [HUD Beat line correct each turn? Beat advances logged in Neural Chain?] - **L-System Tag Leakage:** [Any L-System tags found in output files?] - **Topology Score:** [0-10] → [PASS/CONDITIONAL/FAIL]
## 7. Critical Issues (Bugs) - [List any hallucinations, logic breaks, topology violations, or formatting errors]
## 8. Novel Continuity Analysis (if applicable) - **Story Bible Compliance:** [Does the chapter match story_bible.md state?] - **Timeline Consistency:** [Does in-world time progress logically from previous chapter?] - **Character State Accuracy:** [Physical/emotional/relational state matches tracker?] - **Chekhov Registry Check:** [Planted items: X open, Y resolved this chapter] - **Outline Compliance:** [Were all Key Events covered? POV correct?] - **Continuity Score:** [0-10] → [PASS/CONDITIONAL/FAIL]
## 9. Optimization Recommendations (For ETL Agent) - **Update Character Card:** [Specific suggestions to modify Module A sections] - **Update Scenario Card:** [Specific suggestions to modify Module B beat map or opening] - **Anti-AI-Flavor Notes:** [Specific language patterns to avoid in future sessions]
